# Hornshot
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Hornshot&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Hornshot
| slot = bow
| tier = UT
| rarity = h
| desc = A slingshot, made from the horns of the trolls

| rof = 23
| range = yes
| projSpeed = 10
| lifetime = 800
| minDmg = 500
| maxDmg = 600
| fameb = 8
| feedp = 3600

| effects = yes

| bonuses = {{Stat|wis|-4}} {{Stat|spd|-4}}

| lootbag = white
|dropsFrom = is a white bag drop from the Ortar enemy in the galaxy/starforce.}}
<noinclude>
{{NavBows}}
</noinclude><noinclude>
[[Category:Bows]]</noinclude>
